texto: Take this one in my belly. He (or she) is determined to be here. I can feel the force of his being. It's as if he has something to do here and just wants to arrive and grow up so he can get to it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rebecca Walker: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a familia. O trecho “Take this one in my belly. He (or she) is determined to be here. I can feel the force of his bein…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, motherhood, pregnancy pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de pregnancy.

texto: For many of us it seems that to be a feminist in the way that we have seen or understood feminism is to conform to an identity and way of living that doesn't allow for individuality, complexity, or less than perfect personal histories. We fear that the identity will dictate and regulate our lives, instantaneously pitting us against someone, forcing us to choose inflexible and unchanging sides, female against male, black against white, oppressed against oppressor, good against bad.
explicacao: Citação de Rebecca Walker sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “For many of us it seems that to be a feminist in the way that we have seen or understood feminism…” articula vida, feminism, feminist-quotes em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como feminist-quotes.

texto: I don't trust the everyday: it is a mask, a sham. It gives the illusion of permanence, of an unshatterable calm, a placid surface; and yet underneath the pot is slowly coming to a boil.
explicacao: Citação de Rebecca Walker sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I don't trust the everyday: it is a mask, a sham. It gives the illusion of permanence, of an unsh…” articula reflexao, black, feminism em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como feminism e intersectionality.

texto: . . . when it comes down to it, that’s what life is all about: showing up for the people you love, again and again, until you can’t show up anymore.
explicacao: Citação de Rebecca Walker sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “. . . when it comes down to it, that’s what life is all about: showing up for the people you love…” articula reflexao, inspiracional, again em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
